Package nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels

Class LedgerReconcilePanelFX.ManualEntryHandler

java.lang.Object
nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels.LedgerReconcilePanelFX.ManualEntryHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
EventListener, javafx.event.EventHandler<javafx.event.ActionEvent>
Enclosing class:
LedgerReconcilePanelFX
private class LedgerReconcilePanelFX.ManualEntryHandler extends Object implements javafx.event.EventHandler<javafx.event.ActionEvent>
Handles the "Add Bank Txn" button action. Displays a dialog prompting the user to manually enter details for a bank transaction (Date, Description, Amount). If the user confirms and provides valid input, a new AccountingTransaction is created (though the creation logic in #build() is currently a stub), added to the LedgerReconcilePanelFX.bankTxns list for the current account, and the table is reloaded.

  • Method Details

    • handle

      public void handle(javafx.event.ActionEvent e)
      Shows a dialog for manual bank transaction entry. On OK, it attempts to build an AccountingTransaction using the #build() method (which is currently a stub and returns null). If a transaction were successfully built, it would be added to the current account's bank transactions, and the table would be reloaded.
      Specified by:
      handle in interface javafx.event.EventHandler<javafx.event.ActionEvent>

    • build

      private AccountingTransaction build(javafx.scene.control.DatePicker dateP, javafx.scene.control.TextField descF, javafx.scene.control.TextField amtF)
      Builds an AccountingTransaction from the dialog's input fields.

      Parses the provided date, description, and amount fields to build an AccountingTransaction using the selected account number. If any field is invalid or missing, this method returns null.

      Returns:
      A new AccountingTransaction based on dialog inputs or null if validation fails.
